title: ReviewCompletion
description: Output schema for /second-opinion review completions (v1.9.3). The runner passes this to `codex exec --output-schema` AND independently verifies the output via jq because --output-schema is documented to be silently dropped under two conditions (openai/codex#4181 codex-family gating; #15451 MCP-active ignore). OpenAI strict response_format requires: (1) additionalProperties:false at every object level, (2) `required` to enumerate every key in `properties`. category is an enum so the model always picks one; affected_invariant and location are free-text and the model emits empty strings when not applicable. Our jq verify_conformance still only enforces the semantically-required 6 (id, severity, failure_mode, evidence, required_fix, test) — the other 3 are required at the API contract level only.

scope_hash.description: lowercase hex sha256 of canonical-form scope inputs
